summary: Frontend testing of all 10 specified War Room features: TopBar logo, INTELLIGENCE REQUEST label, placeholder text, 6 quick action buttons, DAILY BRIEFING auto-submit, War Phase hint text, DigSite styling, RU translations (label, placeholder, quick actions, hint). All 10 tests passed.

integration_issues.issue: AI call fails with 'TRANSMISSION FAILED. RETRY MISSION.' - expected as Netlify function endpoint not available in preview. The auto-submit behavior itself works correctly (question is set and submitted).

seed_data_creation: Injected localStorage profile via page.evaluate: server=1042, furnaceLevel=12, heroes=['Murphy (3★)', 'Kimberly (4★)', ...], timezoneOffset=3, seasonWeek=4
context_for_next_testing_agent: App at https://war-ops-ai.preview.emergentagent.com. All new features verified: Last War logo in TopBar, INTELLIGENCE REQUEST (not TODAY'S FOCUS), new placeholder, 6 new quick action buttons (DAILY BRIEFING, ATTACK STRATEGY, DIG SITES, TEMPERATURE, HERO UPGRADE, WAR PHASE), timezone hint in War Phase widget, DigSite snow-blue styling, full RU translations including ЗАПРОС РАЗВЕДКИ, Введите тактический запрос..., and Установите часовой пояс сервера.

test_results.intelligence-request-label: PASS - INTELLIGENCE REQUEST visible, TODAY'S FOCUS gone
test_results.6-quick-action-buttons: PASS - DAILY BRIEFING, ATTACK STRATEGY, DIG SITES, TEMPERATURE, HERO UPGRADE, WAR PHASE all present
test_results.daily-briefing-auto-submit: PASS - click sets question and triggers loading state
test_results.war-phase-hint-text: PASS - 'Set timezone to match your server time' visible
